GB 30255一2019
The applicable test methods for lumen maintenance are determined based on whether LED downlights
adopt LED packages with LM-80 test reports :
When the LED downlight adopts the LED packages with LM-80 test reports and the corresponding pa-
rameters listed in the reports are verified compliance by testing and calculation， then 3 000 h Ilumen
maintenance in the LM-80 test reports can be accepted as the Ilumen maintenance at 3 000 h for the
LED downlight. If the verification indicates non-compliance，or the LED packages without LM-80 test
reports， then Ilumen maintenance shall be tested in accordance with the test methods specified in
GB/T 29293.
5.2 Directional integrated LED lamps
Luminous efficacy， correlated color temperature,， color rendering index and Ilumen maintenance of di-
rectional integrated LED lamps shall be tested in accordance with the test methods specified in GB/T
29295 and GB/T 29296.
5.3 ”Non-directional self-ballasted LED lamps
Luminous efficacy，correlated color temperature，color rendering index and Ilumen maintenance of
non-directional self-ballasted LED lamps shall be tested in accordance with the test methods specified
in GB/T 24824 and GB/T 24908.

5
